title: Process Steps for Metabolism Data
author: European Food Safety Authority
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: This document gives an overview and a detailed description of the process steps to follow to report structured metabolism data in the context of EU applications. The document describes how to create study records for metabolism studies in IUCLID making use of the structured data reported in the MetaPath software package. This workflow involves the industry when preparing an application containing metabolism studies and the risk assessment Authorities when reviewing an application.
